calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2025 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jul-24-2025 Continued To Jul-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jul-25-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment filed Apr-16-2025.

Dept. 514; Judge: Daniel A. Flores; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:17:22 a.m., pausing at 09:27:18 a.m., reconvening at 01:38:16 p.m., and concluding at 01:54:23 p.m.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. represented by Jakob S. Weitz, Esq.
Defendant Hapbee Technologies USA, INC. DBA Hapbee Technologies ADBA Hapbee not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff and its Witness Samantha Hatcher appearing via Zoom Video Conference.

09:17 a.m. - Court has reviewed Plaintiff's request for default judgment, declarations, and the contract in this action. Court addresses its concerns regarding Exhibit A, Standard Terms and Conditions, Paragraph 7. Governing Law; Arbitration.
Counsel states its position.

09:27 a.m. - Counsel for Plaintiff is ordered to file a pocket brief providing authority that supports its position forthwith. Court orders matter continued to 01:30 p.m. for further hearing. Court stands in recess.

01:37 p.m. - Court has reviewed Plaintiff's Brief Addressing Waiver of Arbitration Clause filed this date. The brief, combined with its own independent investigation led the Court to the same conclusion, and it finds that it is appropriate to move forward.

SAMANTHA HATCHER is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.
CCP 585 Declaration of Tseli "Lily" Yang and its Exhibits are hereby ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE.

SAMANTHA HATCHER testifies under direct examination.

01:47 p.m. - SAMANTHA HATCHER is excused. Counsel for Plaintiff present its case for the award of pre-judgment interest, attorney fees and costs. It submits to the jurisdictional maximum of attorney's fees for limited cases.

01:51 p.m. - Counsel for Plaintiff, Jakob S. Weitz, Esq. is sworn and examined by the Court.
01:52 p.m. - Court finds good cause to grant the relief as requested by Plaintiff. JUDGMENT IS HEREBY ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AND AGAINST DEFENDANT HAPBEE TECHNOLOGIES USA, INC. DBA HAPBEE TECHNOLOGIES ADBA HAPBEE as follows:

1. Damages = $47,700.00
2. Prejudgment interest at the annual rate of 18% = $26,836.32
3. Costs = $502.49
4. Attorney fees = $2,825.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT = $77,863.81

Proposed judgment signed and filed. Court adjourns.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2025 Continued To Sep-10-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
